query:
SELECT 
  j.id as jobId, j.status as jobStatus, j.completedScenes, j.totalScenes,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalSceneRows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingScenes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generatingScenes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedSceneRows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failedScenes,
  MAX(s.updatedAt) as lastSceneUpdate
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510099
GROUP BY j.id;
